name: codex-auto-router
description: Routes Codex work to explicitly named, model-pinned Terra, Spark, and Luna custom agents, preferring GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark for text scanning with GPT-5.6 Luna fallback, plus nested helpers, Git worktree isolation, and mandatory parent review.

interface.shortDescription: Route work to Terra, Spark, and Luna agents
interface.longDescription: Mention Auto Router and describe only the outcome. The Sol or Terra parent uses exact named custom agents, prefers GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark for bounded text scanning, falls back to GPT-5.6 Luna when Spark is unavailable or unsuitable, isolates conflicting writes with Git worktrees, and reviews every result before integration.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this repository with model-pinned Terra agents and Spark-first scanners, falling back to Luna only when Spark is unavailable.
Implement this issue with named Terra workers, isolated worktrees where needed, and parent review.
Process this large task set in exact named custom-agent threads and report every Spark-to-Luna fallback reason.
